meta.title: How To Send Letters To Basic Training
meta.description:
Writing letters to basic training has never been easier with Sandboxx. Send letters, photos, newsletters & more to your recruit from anywhere, anytime. Get delivery updates, and weekly training updates and build a community of support to help your recruit through training. We’ll print, ship, and deliver it, so your recruit gets your love and support faster. 

Learn More
https://www.sandboxx.us

Download Sandboxx
https://link.sandboxx.us/fbEkhqtZoS
